inline_comments.message: just one comment for the value of this feature: it uses "DPDK", in the https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/HPA+Policies+and+Mappings, the value is v12.1, what's the expected scope of value? like >=v10.

hmm, it seems there is mismatch between ETSI NFV ISG HPA Capability Registry draft and the wiki. In the draft, there are 2 separate keys: dataProcessingAccelerationLibrary and dataProcessingAccelerationLibraryVersion. But it seems in the wiki https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=25439922, dataProcessingAccelerationLibray is used to specify both library and version. We need to sort that out.
